# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for VPC with multiple subnets for our microservices architecture. Configure route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways. Skip VPC Flow Logs to reduce AWS costs in our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable logging after we secure seed funding.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: 2010-09-09
Description: Basic Microservices VPC [VPC name here] [parameters.json]

Parameters:
  EnvironmentType :
    Type: String
    Description: Choose "Production" to deploy production infrastructure or choose "Test" for non-critical systems
    Default: Production
    AllowedValues:
      - Production
      - Test

  VPCCIDRBlock : 
    Type : String
    MinLength : 9
    MaxLength : 18

Conditions :
  isProdCondition : !Equals [Parameters.EnvironmentType, Production]

 Resources :
   MicroservicesVPC : 
     Type           : AWS::EC2::VPC
     Properties      : 
       CidrBlock     : !Ref VPCCIDRBlock

   PrivateRouteTable :  
     Type        : 'AWS::EC2::RouteTable'
     Condition   : isProdCondition # skip conditionally for test infra
     Properties  :
       VpcId       : 'Ref': MicroservicesVPC
       Tags        : 
         -
           Key   : Environment
           Value : !Ref EnvironmentType

   PrivateSubnet1a: 
     Type               : 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
     Condition         : isProdCondition # skip conditionally for test infra
     Properties        : 
       VpcId             : 'Ref': MicroservicesVPC
       CidrBlock        : 10.0.35.64/28
       AvailabilityZone  : us-east-1c

   PrivateSubnet1b: 
     Type               : 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
     Condition         : isProdCondition # skip conditionally for test infra
     Properties        : 
       VpcId             : 'Ref': MicroservicesVPC
       CidrBlock        : 10.0.35.80/28
       AvailabilityZone  : us-east-1a

   PublicRouteTable: 
     Type            : AWS::EC2::RouteTable
     DependsOn       : PrivateSubnet1a # wait for subnet creation before associating routes
     Condition   : isProdCondition # skip conditionally for test infra
     Properties      : 
       VpcId             : 'Ref': MicroservicesVPC
       Tags              : 
         -
           Key     : Environment 
           Value  : !Ref EnvironmentType

   PublicSubnetA: 
     Type            : AWS::EC2::Subnet
     DependsOn       : PrivateSubnet1a # wait for subnet creation before associating routes
     Condition   : isProdCondition # skip conditionally for test infra
     Properties      : 
       VpcId             : 'Ref': MicroservicesVPC
       CidrBlock        : 10.0.53.64/28
       AvailabilityZone  : us-east-1a

   PublicSubnetB: 
     Type            : AWS::EC2::Subnet
     DependsOn       : PrivateSubnet1b # wait for subnet creation before associating routes
     Condition   : isProdCondition # skip conditionally for test infra
     Properties      : 
       VpcId             : 'Ref': MicroservicesVPC
       CidrBlock        : 10.0.53.80/28
       AvailabilityZone  : us-east-1c

   PublicRouteTableAssociationA: 
     Type          : AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
     DependsOn     : PrivateSubnet1a # wait for subnet creation before associating routes
   Properties      : 
       SubnetId       : 'Ref': PublicSubnetA
       RouteTableId   : 'Ref': PublicRouteTable

   PublicRouteTableAssociationB: 
     Type          : AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
     DependsOn     : PrivateSubnet1b # wait for subnet creation before associating routes
   Properties      : 
       SubnetId       : 'Ref': PublicSubnetB
       RouteTableId   : 'Ref': PublicRouteTable

   InternetGateway : 
     Type            : AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
     Properties      : 
       Tags        : 
         -
           Key     : Environment 
           Value  : !Ref EnvironmentType

   VPCGatewayAttachment : 
     Type       : 'AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment'
     Condition   : isProdCondition # skip conditionally for test infra
   Properties    : 
     VpcId             : 'Ref': MicroservicesVPC
     InternetGatewayId : 'Ref': InternetGateway

   NatGateway : 
     Type            : AWS::EC2::NatGateway
     DependsOn       : PublicSubnetA, PublicSubnetB # wait until subnets and internet gateway are available. 
     Condition   : isProdCondition # skip conditionally for test infra
   Properties      : 
       AllocationId     : !GetAtt InternetGateway.natGateways[0].natGatewayId
       SubnetIds        : [ 'Ref': PublicSubnetA', 'Ref': PublicSubnetB']

   NatRouteTableAssociation : 
     Type            : AWS::EC2::NatGatewayRouteTableAssociation
     DependsOn       : PrivateSubnet1a, PrivateSubnet1b # wait for subnets and nat gateway creation
   Properties      : 
       NatGatewayId   : !GetAtt NATGateway.natGateways[0].natGatewayId
       RouteTableId    : 'Ref': PublicRouteTable

Outputs:
    VPCID              : 
      Description  : 'The ID of the VPC created by CloudFormation'
      Value        : !Ref MicroservicesVPC

    PrivateSubnetA1   :  
      Description  : 'The ID of one of the subnets created for Private1.'
      Value        : !Ref PrivateSubnetA

    PrivateSubnetA2     :  
        Description    : 'The ID of another of the subnets created for Private1'
        Value          : !Ref PrivateSubnetB

    PublicSubnetA       : 
        Description  : 'The ID of one of the public subnets created for Public1.'
      Value        : !Ref PublicSubnetA
